verdict: Jack Black All Over Body Lotion SPF 25 uniquely combines UV protection with body moisturization, though the SPF requirement compromises formulation elegance. The mineral sunscreen addition limits premium ingredient concentration compared to non-SPF competitors.

_research.name: Jack Black All Over Body Lotion SPF 25
_research.con: SPF formulation reduces space for premium skincare actives and creates different texture expectations than standard body lotions.
